title: centaurium gypsicola
intro: Centaurium gypsicola, also known as the gypsum centaury, is a rare and endangered plant species native to the gypsum soils in the Balkan Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Centaurium gypsicola include its potential to treat digestive issues, such as ulcers and diarrhea, as well as its ability to act as an antiseptic and anti-inflammatory agent. Centaurium gypsicola can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which are often used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
